title: Graceful Worker Shutdown in Python
summary: Run a queue-based worker that finishes accepted work, rejects new submissions during shutdown, and runs cleanup once.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9 on macOS. Verified behavior covers queued work execution, submission rejection after shutdown, draining accepted work, cleanup after queue drain, shutdown timeout handling, worker recovery after handler exceptions, and signal handler installation plus restore.
